title: KompotikIvun's BareBones - Create Edition
description: Enchance your vanila gaming experience and rotate it up to 360°!
body:
![Logo](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1013870874501324933/1164423090751688784/BareBones_LogoFinished.png?ex=65432882&is=6530b382&hm=f6b3af95dd1751f88848202b25685fc138a43f29722590a9b66745df090b91fc&=&width=705&height=264)

![LINE](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1013870874501324933/1164424885808926831/BarebonesLines.png?ex=65432a2e&is=6530b52e&hm=06785bb5ef46d41269f0797314b89cd359f2c4dffdb84885de7296d09872c9c1&=&width=705&height=27)

"BareBones - Create Edition" is a modpack inspired by Create mod and content maker @lowresbones on youtube.

This particular modpack contains mainly simple and vanila-like mods with a bit of game-changing 
mechanics like BetterCombat or Nyf's Spiders, nothing too absurd, aswell as, of course Create mod!

![LINE](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1013870874501324933/1164424885808926831/BarebonesLines.png?ex=65432a2e&is=6530b52e&hm=06785bb5ef46d41269f0797314b89cd359f2c4dffdb84885de7296d09872c9c1&=&width=705&height=27)


<details>
<summary>Some Tips about modpack</summary>

- There's a Recipie mod GUI of which is turned off by default, just press Ctrl+O while in inventory to show it again. (Also you can Favoruite your recipies by pressing "A" while hovering over an item you want to remember how to craft!
- There's no usual zoom mod in this modpack but you can craft spyglass and bind it zoom in controls (binded to "C" by default). Spyglass itself can be wherever in your inventory!
- There's a BetterCombat mod installed and if you don't like the way it is with mining and such you should consider looking up it's config and configurating it to yourself.
- There's a Dynamic Light mod.
- There's a Combat Roll mod aswell, you can Roll by pressing "R" button.
- There's a ReplayMod for any of you Content Creators.
- Also there's an "Infinite Music" mod installed so enjoy all the tunes at all times :)
- If you don't like seeing yourself in first-person mode you can turn it off by pressing "F6".
</details>


<details>
<summary>Disclaimer and Credits</summary>

First of all I'm not associated with any of mod/resorucepack teams and it's simply modpack for me and you to have fun with! 

also I'm not amazing with modpack making so if you see any mistake or an Issue let me know! I'll try and fix them in the future!

SUPPORT ORIGINAL CREATORS <3

Credit to: 
| https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bare-bones-eating-animation-addon |
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/barebones-leaves |
https://vanillatweaks.net |
</details>

<details>
<summary>Recommend to Install aswell</summary>
Since the Copyright issues arise and some of the creators won't answer me if I could include their stuff in the modpack I really recommend you to add these 2 resource packs for full immersion:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bare-bones-visuality-addon 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fancy-gui-overhaul

</details>

![LINE](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1013870874501324933/1164424885808926831/BarebonesLines.png?ex=65432a2e&is=6530b52e&hm=06785bb5ef46d41269f0797314b89cd359f2c4dffdb84885de7296d09872c9c1&=&width=705&height=27)

This modpack is a sequel to my clean and optimized BareBones modpack - KompotikIvun's BareBones - Optimized. If you have any question, you can contact me on discord trough discord tab under modpack to the left and you can support me if you want (๑•ᴗ•๑)

![LINE](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1013870874501324933/1164424885808926831/BarebonesLines.png?ex=65432a2e&is=6530b52e&hm=06785bb5ef46d41269f0797314b89cd359f2c4dffdb84885de7296d09872c9c1&=&width=705&height=27)

Also I should note that this modpack includes mod e4mc made by vgskye, what it does that its basicaly makes "Open to LAN" button easier, you can just click it once or twice and when port will be announced in chat - also will be an adress for any of your friends to easily connect! It's an amazing mod and I personally shocked on how good it is so check out the original on: https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc and have fun with your friends!

![LINE](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1013870874501324933/1164424885808926831/BarebonesLines.png?ex=65432a2e&is=6530b52e&hm=06785bb5ef46d41269f0797314b89cd359f2c4dffdb84885de7296d09872c9c1&=&width=705&height=27)

Sadly I wasn't able to impliment voicechat with e4mc just by pressing "Open to LAN" so you'll have to figure it out how to play this modpack with your friends yourself (づ ᴗ͈༝ᴗ͈)づ

![LINE](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1013870874501324933/1164424885808926831/BarebonesLines.png?ex=65432a2e&is=6530b52e&hm=06785bb5ef46d41269f0797314b89cd359f2c4dffdb84885de7296d09872c9c1&=&width=705&height=27)

Check out my other clean and optimized BareBones modpack - https://modrinth.com/modpack/kompotikivuns-barebones-optimized
